title: A Private Art Campaign
article_text: Everyone in the office can relate to our recent campaign. The official art show is inside the park this summer. I never forget my private key for the financial page. Let's pause and drink some water. This art represents the heart of our team. Everyone has an opinion about the summer art. Sometimes I miss the private meetings. The financial source is a key part of our campaign. Do not worry about the page number. The employee can manage the art inside the park.

sentences.en: Everyone in the office can relate to our recent campaign.
sentences.zh: 办公室里的每个人都能理解我们最近的宣传活动。

to understand or connect

a series of actions for a goal

sentences.zh: 官方的艺术展今年夏天在公园里面。

sentences.en: I never forget my private key for the financial page.
sentences.zh: 我从不忘记我的私人钥匙用于财务页面。

sentences.en: Sometimes I miss the private meetings.

quiz.question_en: What is the Chinese meaning of 'campaign'?
Which word means 'to stop for a short time'?
Which word means 'to stand for something'?

image_prompts: A busy office with many people, one person pointing at a poster on the wall.
A park with trees and an outdoor art show, people looking at paintings.
A person holding a key near a computer screen showing a financial page.
Two people sitting at a table, one holding a glass of water, both smiling.
A painting on an easel with a heart shape in the center, team members around it.
A group of people talking and gesturing near summer art displays.
A person looking out a window with a sad expression, thinking of a past meeting.
A diagram showing money flowing from a source into a campaign poster.
A person looking at a book with a worried face, a page number highlighted.
A park with art pieces, an employee putting up a sign and managing the area.
